name: claude-image-tts-gen-mcp
description: MCP server for multi-provider image and TTS generation

scripts.build:server: esbuild src/server.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node18 --format=esm --outfile=dist/server.js --external:@imgly/background-removal-node --external:onnxruntime-node --banner:js="import { createRequire } from 'module'; const require = createRequire(import.meta.url);"
scripts.build:cli:
esbuild src/cli.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node18 --format=esm --outfile=dist/cli.js --external:@imgly/background-removal-node --external:onnxruntime-node --banner:js="#!/usr/bin/env node
import { createRequire } from 'module'; const require = createRequire(import.meta.url);"
scripts.build:refresh:
esbuild src/pricing/refresh.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node18 --format=esm --outfile=dist/refresh.js --banner:js="#!/usr/bin/env node
import { createRequire } from 'module'; const require = createRequire(import.meta.url);"
scripts.build: npm run typecheck && npm run build:server && npm run build:cli && npm run build:refresh
